name: notebook-cell-index
description: Shows sequential cell numbers (Cell 1, Cell 2, ...) in the status bar of notebook cells. Custom format templates, alignment, per-kind toggles, and section-based counter resets.

notebookCellIndex.format.description: Preset label format. Ignored if `customFormat` is set.

notebookCellIndex.customFormat.description: Custom label template (e.g. 'Cell {n}/{total}', '{section}.{n}'). Tokens: {n}, {n0}, {total}, {grandTotal}, {section}, {kind}. Empty falls back to `format`.

notebookCellIndex.showTotal.description: Show the total cell count alongside the index (e.g. 'Cell 2/5'). Has no effect if the template already contains {total}.

notebookCellIndex.alignment.description: Alignment of the cell-number badge in the cell status bar.

notebookCellIndex.hideWhenSingle.description: Hide the cell-number badge when the notebook has 0 or 1 displayed cells.

notebookCellIndex.showMarkdownNumbers.description: Show numbering on markdown cells. When enabled, markdown cells receive a status-bar number and count toward the total.

enumDescriptions: Number cells continuously across the whole notebook.
Restart the counter at every H1 (`# `) markdown cell.
Restart the counter at every H1 (`# `) or H2 (`## `) markdown cell.
notebookCellIndex.resetCounterOnSection.description: Restart the counter when a markdown cell starts with the configured heading level. Combine with `customFormat` and the `{section}` token to display hierarchical labels like '1.3'.

notebookCellIndex.includeMarkdownCells.description: Legacy alias for `showMarkdownNumbers`. When the new setting is unset, this value is used as its default.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run typecheck && npm run compile
